hero.sub: A {{word}} is a savings circle your community has run for generations. We made it unbreakable — secure, automatic, no bank required.

tanda.title: What is a Tanda?
tanda.p1: A Tanda is a community savings circle. A group of people agree to each put in the same amount every week — and every week, one person takes home the whole pot. It rotates until everyone has received their payout.
tanda.p2: No interest. No bank. No profit. Just a group of people helping each other save and get ahead — the way communities have done it for centuries.
tanda.p3: You might know it as an Osusu, Hui, Stokvel, Chit Fund, or Arisan — same idea, every culture has one.
tanda.p4: The problem? When the organizer disappears, or someone stops paying after getting their payout. DeFi Tanda fixes that with a smart contract — code nobody can override, not even us.

how.title: How it works
how.sub: Three steps. No bank account required.
how.step1: The organizer sets up a tanda — group size, weekly amount, and duration. Members join with a small security deposit that earns interest and comes back to you at the end.
how.step2: Pay your share weekly, biweekly, or monthly. Use Apple Pay, Google Pay, debit card — or connect your crypto wallet directly.
how.step3: When your turn comes, the full pot lands in your wallet automatically. Early slot = interest-free loan. Late slot = disciplined savings plan.

why.title: Why DeFi Tanda?
why.sub: Everything that made traditional tandas break — fixed.

fraud.title: Nobody can run off with the money
fraud.body: A smart contract holds every dollar. The organizer manages the group — but never touches the funds. Payouts are automatic, on time, every time.

bank.title: No bank account needed
bank.body: All you need is a phone. Pay with Apple Pay or Google Pay — or connect a crypto wallet. Your money, your control.

remit.title: Send your payout anywhere
remit.body: Receive in USDC and send to family in Mexico in seconds — for almost no fee. No Western Union. No 7% cut.

record.title: A permanent record
record.body: Every contribution and payout is recorded on the blockchain forever. No disputes, no 'I paid already.'

whatsapp.title: Runs through WhatsApp
whatsapp.body: Reminders, confirmations, and payout alerts sent to your WhatsApp. Organize where your community already is.

yield.title: Your deposit earns interest
yield.body: Your security deposit earns yield while locked. You get it all back when the tanda completes — plus a little extra.

pay.title: Pay your way
pay.sub: You do not need crypto to get started. Use what you already have on your phone.
pay.fiatBody: Tap to pay with Apple Pay, Google Pay, or a debit card. We convert your dollars to USDC automatically.
pay.walletBody: Already have crypto? Connect Phantom, MetaMask, Coinbase Wallet, or Xaman and pay directly.

chains.title: Available on 3 networks
chains.sub: Pick the blockchain that fits your community best.

sol.body: Blazing fast and ultra cheap. Most of our tandas run on Solana — great for any group size.
sol.best: ⭐ Most popular · Recommended for new members

eth.body: The largest DeFi ecosystem. Best for bigger tandas and crypto-savvy groups.

xrpl.body: Settles in 3 seconds for a fraction of a cent. Great for sending money cross-border.

learn.title: Never done crypto before?
learn.body1: That's okay — most of our users haven't either. Akademia is our free education center, built for people who grew up with tandas but are new to the digital side.
learn.body2: Short videos in Spanish and English. No jargon. From 'what is crypto' to 'how to send money to Mexico for free.'
learn.l1: ¿Qué es una tanda? — You already know this
learn.l3: ¿Qué es una wallet? — Your digital piggy bank
learn.l4: How to join your first tanda — step by step
learn.l5: Send your payout to Mexico for free

waitlist.title: Be the first to join
waitlist.body: We're launching in Chicago with a small group of community members first. Leave your email and we'll reach out when your spot is ready.
waitlist.success: ✓ You're on the list! We'll be in touch.
waitlist.note: No spam. No sharing. Just a heads-up when we open.

dashboard.noWallet: Connect your wallet to get started
